languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The servo-skull rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? His impoverished mind cannot grasp the importance of maintenance rituals, nor can it perceive that machines are not soulless lumps of metal. Rogue Trader, I demand that the blasphemous hands of this marvel of mediocrity, this utter ignoramus, be amputated at the first opportunity!"

languages.text: {n}Эоганн парит, обсессивно осматривая Нунциуса. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Сервочереп{/g} лежит у него в руках с потухшим глазом и замершими манипуляторами. Судя по всему, манипулус проводит ремонтные ритуалы над спутником.{/n} "Мясник. Техногубитель! Проклятый ксенос возомнил себя сведущим в делах священной инженерии! Омниссия, даруй мне ясность мысли и охлади праведный гнев в моих синапсах! Что ксенос может знать о таинствах машинных духов? Его убогий разум не способен постичь важности ритуалов обслуживания, он не может уразуметь, что машины — не бездушные куски металла. Вольный Торговец, я настаиваю на ампутации кощунственных дланей этого поразительного в своей посредственности невежды при первой возможности!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Эоганн парит, обсессивно осматривая Нунциуса. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Сервочереп{/g} лежит у него в руках с потухшим глазом и замершими манипуляторами. Судя по всему, манипулус перевел его режим отладки.{/n} "Мясник. Техноварвар! Проклятый ксенос возомнил себя сведущим в делах священной инженерии! Что может знать он о таинствах машинных духов? Его убогий разум не способен постичь важности ритуалов обслуживания, он не может уразуметь, что машины — не бездушные куски металла. Вольный Торговец, я настаиваю на ампутации кощунственных дланей этого поразительного в своей посредственности невежды при первой возможности!"

It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? His impoverished mind cannot grasp the importance of maintenance rituals, nor can it perceive that machines are not soulless lumps of metal. Rogue Trader, I demand that the blasphemous hands of this marvel of mediocrity, this utter ignoramus, be amputated at the first opportunity!"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn flota en el aire mientras examina obsesivamente a Nuncius. El {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} descansa en las manos del tecnosacerdote, con el ojo apagado y los manipuladores inmóviles. Parece que Eogunn está administrando unos rituales de reparación a su compañero.{/n} «Carnicero. ¡Profanador de tecnologías! ¡Ese maldito xenos se las da de experto en ingeniería sagrada! ¡Omnissiah, despeja mi mente y aplaca la justa cólera de mis sinapsis! ¿Qué sabrá un xenos sobre los misterios de los espíritus máquina? Su mente insignificante no puede comprender la importancia de los rituales de mantenimiento ni percibir que las máquinas no son montones de metal desalmado. ¡Comerciante, exijo la amputación inmediata de las manos blasfemas de esta maravilla de la mediocridad, de este absoluto ignorante!».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? His impoverished mind cannot grasp the importance of maintenance rituals, nor can it perceive that machines are not soulless lumps of metal. Parece que Eogunn está administrando unos rituales de reparación a su compañero.{/n} «Carnicero. ¡Profanador de tecnologías! ¡Ese maldito xenos se las da de experto en ingeniería sagrada! ¡Omnissiah, despeja mi mente y aplaca la justa cólera de mis sinapsis! ¿Qué sabrá un xenos sobre los misterios de los espíritus máquina? languages.text: {n}伊奥贡悬在半空，近乎偏执地检查着努恩修斯。那{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}躺在技术神甫手中，它的眼睛黯淡，机械触须也一动不动，看来伊奥贡正在为他的同伴执行修复仪式。{/n}“屠夫。科技亵渎者！那该死的异形，竟自诩是什么神圣工程学方面的专家！欧姆尼赛亚，请赐我明澈的思维，冷却我神经突触中正义的怒火！区区一个异形，怎么可能懂得机魂的奥秘？他那贫瘠的头脑根本理解不了维护仪式的分量，更无法认识到机器并不是一堆没有灵魂的金属疙瘩。行商浪人，对于这个平庸至极、彻头彻尾的无知之徒，我请求一有机会就砍掉他那双亵渎的手！”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? His impoverished mind cannot grasp the importance of maintenance rituals, nor can it perceive that machines are not soulless lumps of metal. Rogue Trader, I demand that the blasphemous hands of this marvel of mediocrity, this utter ignoramus, be amputated at the first opportunity!"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn plane dans les airs, examinant Nuncius avec la plus grande attention. Le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} repose entre les mains du technoprêtre, son œil noir et ses manipulateurs immobiles. Eogunn semble accomplir des rituels de réparation sur son compagnon.{/n} « Boucher. Technovandale ! Cette saleté de xénos se prend pour un expert en ingénierie sacrée ! Omnimessie, clarifiez mon esprit et apaisez la fureur vertueuse qui envahit mes synapses ! Qu'est-ce qu'un xénos pourrait bien connaître des mystères d'un esprit de la machine ? Son cerveau misérable ne comprendra jamais l'importance des rituels de maintenance, en plus d'être parfaitement incapable de percevoir que les machines ne sont pas des amas de métal sans âme. {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, j'exige que les mains impies de ce parangon de médiocrité, de cet ignare absolu, soient amputées dans les plus brefs délais ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? Son cerveau misérable ne comprendra jamais l'importance des rituels de maintenance, en plus d'être parfaitement incapable de percevoir que les machines ne sont pas des amas de métal sans âme. {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, j'exige que les mains impies de ce parangon de médiocrité, de cet ignare absolu, soient amputées dans les plus brefs délais ! »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schwebt in der Luft und untersucht Nuncius. Der {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} ruht in den Händen des Techpriesters. Seine Augen sind dunkel, seine Manipulatoren reglos. Offenbar führt Eogunn an seinem Gefährten Reparaturrituale durch.{/n} "Schlächter. Techzerstörer! Dieser verdammte Xenos hält sich für einen Experten in allen Fragen der heiligen Ingenieurskunst! Omnissiah, gewähre mir gedankliche Klarheit und kühle den rechtschaffenen Zorn in meinen Synapsen! Was könnte ein Xenos schon über die Mysterien der Maschinengeister wissen? Sein dürftiger Geist kann weder die Bedeutung von Wartungsritualen erfassen, noch erkennt er, dass Maschinen keine seelenlosen Metallklumpen sind. {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, ich verlange, dass die blasphemischen Hände dieses Ausbundes an Mittelmäßigkeit und Ignoranz bei erster Gelegenheit amputiert werden!"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? His impoverished mind cannot grasp the importance of maintenance rituals, nor can it perceive that machines are not soulless lumps of metal. Rogue Trader, I demand that the blasphemous hands of this marvel of mediocrity, this utter ignoramus, be amputated at the first opportunity!"

languages.text: {n}エオガンが宙に浮かび、ヌンキウスを執拗に検分している。{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}サーヴォスカル{/g}は技術司祭の手の中にあり、その眼は暗く、マニピュレーターは静止している。エオガンは相棒に修復の儀式を施しているようだ。{/n}「肉屋め。技術の破壊者め！あの忌々しい異種族が、神聖工学の専門家を気取っている！オムニサイアよ、我が思考に明晰さを与え、シナプスに宿る正義の怒りを鎮めたまえ！異種族ごときに機械霊の神秘の何がわかるというのだ？その貧弱な精神は、整備の儀式の重要性を把握することも、機械が魂のない金属の塊ではないと悟ることもできない。ローグ・トレーダーよ、この凡庸の驚異、この度し難い無知者の冒涜的な手を、機会があり次第切断することを要求する！」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits? His impoverished mind cannot grasp the importance of maintenance rituals, nor can it perceive that machines are not soulless lumps of metal. languages.text: {n}Eogunn, havada süzülerek takıntılı bir şekilde Nuncius'u inceliyor. Gözü karanlık, manipülatörleri hareketsiz olan {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmelet{/g}; Tekno Rahip'in ellerinde duruyor. Görünüşe göre Eogunn, yoldaşı üzerinde onarım ayinleri gerçekleştiriyor.{/n} "Kasap. Tekno yağmacı! Kahrolası zeno, kendini kutsal mühendislik konularında uzman sanıyor! Hermesih bana zihin açıklığı bahşetsin, sinapslarımdaki haflı öfkeyi dindirsin! Bir zeno, makine ruhlarının gizemleri hakkında ne bilebilir ki? O kıt aklı, bakım ayinlerinin önemini kavrayamaz veya makinelerin ruhsuz metal yığınları olmadığını algılayamaz. Bu vasatlık harikası cahil cühelanın kâfir ellerinin ilk fırsatta kesilmesini talep ediyorum Hür Tacir!"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn hovers in mid-air, obsessively examining Nuncius. The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} rests in the Tech-Priest's hands, his eye dark and his manipulators still. It seems that Eogunn is performing repair rituals on his companion.{/n} "Butcher. Tech-ravager! That damned xenos fancies himself an expert in matters of sacred engineering! Omnissiah, grant me clarity of thought and cool the righteous fury in my synapses! What could a xenos possibly know about the mysteries of machine spirits?
